creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ping...

I'm still having problems with it. The attached patch disables the sys/inotify.h detection, fixing the problem. [1]

I'm depending on this to update x11-fm/gnome-commander2.

I've added LIB_DEPENDS to silence Q/A as well.

[1] /usr/local/lib/gnome-vfs-2.0/modules/libfile.so: Undefined symbol "ih_startup"
